categories.label: Sports Coaching
categories.description: Professional sports training for children aged 4–16, led by certified coaches. Build fitness, discipline, and teamwork through structured weekly sessions.

programs.name: Football
programs.schedule: Mon, Wed, Fri — 5:30 PM to 7:00 PM
programs.description: Develop football fundamentals including dribbling, passing, shooting, and tactical awareness. Batches are grouped by age for focused coaching.
programs.equipment: Comfortable sportswear, football boots or running shoes

programs.name: Karate
programs.schedule: Tue, Thu, Sat — 6:00 PM to 7:00 PM
programs.description: Traditional Shotokan Karate training focusing on self-discipline, respect, and self-defence. Students progress through belt grades with regular assessments.
programs.equipment: Karate uniform (gi) — available for purchase at ₹600 extra

programs.name: Swimming
programs.coachQualification: SAI Certified Swimming Coach, Red Cross Lifeguard
programs.description: Structured beginner-to-advanced batches covering freestyle, breaststroke, backstroke, and butterfly. Safety-first approach with lifeguard on duty at all times.
programs.equipment: Swimsuit, swim cap, and goggles mandatory

categories.label: Cultural Programs
categories.description: Nurture your child's creativity and cultural awareness through performing arts, music, and dance. Programs designed to build confidence and self-expression.

categories.label: Other Activities
categories.description: Additional enrichment programs for holistic development — from academic support to hobby workshops. More programs coming soon.
